news_items.headline: Get ready for baseball: How to watch Red Sox spring training games
news_items.description: As the Boston Red Sox kick off their 2026 season, check out how to catch spring training games on NESN.

news_items.headline: Japan rallies late to beat Australia behind Masataka Yoshida HR
news_items.description: Defending champion Japan rallied from 1-0 down to beat Australia 4-3 in the World Baseball Classic on Sunday behind a two-run homer from Masataka Yoshida with two outs in the seventh inning.

news_items.headline: Tarik Skubal mulls changing WBC plan: 'Hard to walk away'
news_items.description: Tarik Skubal says he is considering pitching again for the United States at the World Baseball Classic, a potential change in plans for the Tigers' ace.

news_items.headline: Darell Hernaiz's walk-off HR lifts Puerto Rico to WBC win
news_items.description: Darell Hernaiz, 24, an infield prospect with the Athletics, hit a 374-foot home run to left field in the 10th inning to lift host Puerto Rico to a 4-3 World Baseball Classic victory over Panama.

news_items.headline: Andy Page hits a double for the Dodgers
news_items.description: Andy Page connects on a Double to tie the score 1-1 for the Dodgers.

news_items.headline: World Baseball Classic: Schwarber launches 427-foot home run
news_items.description: The Philadelphia Phillies' slugger hit a tiebreaking homer for Team USA.
